pre.2050: The average French person emits nearly 9.3 tonnes of CO2 per year. To limit climate change, it is essential to reduce these emissions and achieve a maximum target of 2 tonnes of CO₂e per person per year by 2050.
pre.avion-pny: Travel by plane, very long journey. Total distance traveled: 11,600 km.
pre.voiture-lille-nimes: Journey made alone, in an average car running on diesel over a total distance of 1,882 km.
pre.ski: Average value. Study conducted for a day of skiing in La Clusaz, Le Grand Bornand, and Tignes.
pre.piscine: Average size of a private pool: 8 x 4m with a depth ranging from 1.5m to 2.1m.
pre.terre-voiture: Journey made alone, in a sedan running on gasoline over a total distance of 40,000 km.
pre.harry-potter: All Harry Potter films last an average of 1,176 minutes = 19.6 hours. The data is calculated based on one hour of HD streaming on a television using Wi-Fi.
pre.smartphone: Average screen size: 6.63 inches, a mix of LCD and OLED technologies, 8GB of RAM, 210GB of storage (weighted mix across 3 configurations: 24%, 24%, 52%). Average usage for personal and professional purposes.
pre.ordinateurfixeparticulier: 1 CPU, 10GB RAM, 1,173GB HDD, 442GB SSD, mix of integrated and separate graphics cards (weighted mix across 5 configurations of personal desktop computers, without screens).
pre.ordinateurfixeprofessionnel: 1 CPU, 8GB RAM, 1,000GB HDD, 250GB SSD, separate graphics card (a simple configuration).
pre.ecran: Average size (24 inches) and mix of technologies (98.6% LCD, 1.4% OLED) (weighted mix between 2 computer screen configurations).
pre.tabletteclassique: 10.53-inch screen, a mix of LCD screen technologies, 4.7GB RAM, 144GB storage (weighted mix across 3 tablet configurations). Average usage for personal and professional purposes.
pre.television: Average size and technology (82% LCD (45 inches), 1% OLED (53 inches), 17% OLED (68 inches)) (weighted mix across 3 TV configurations).
pre.ordinateurportable: Average 14.6-inch screen, 1 CPU, 11GB RAM, 497GB SSD (weighted mix across 3 laptop configurations for personal use).
pre.casquevr: Average of two technologies (50% LCD, 50% OLED) + consideration of two controllers.
pre.box: Personal and professional usage; xDSL, FTTx.
pre.boeuf: Average of emission factors for rib steak, entrecôte, beef tongue, flank steak, beef shoulder, beef cheek.
pre.veau: Average of emission factors for veal rib, veal shoulder, veal escalope, veal nut, veal breast, and veal sweetbread.
pre.porc: Average of emission factors for pork chop, pork shoulder, pork belly, pork loin.
pre.dorade: Average of emission factors for farmed gilthead seabream and wild gilthead seabream.
pre.beurre: Average of emission factors for unsalted butter and salted butter.
pre.fromagedure: Average of emission factors for various hard cheeses: Emmental, Gruyère, Comté, Gouda, etc.
pre.fromagemolle: Average of emission factors for various soft cheeses: Camembert, Brie, Maroilles, Mont-d'Or, etc.
pre.fromagebleu: Average of emission factors for various blue cheeses: Roquefort, Bleu d'Auvergne, Gorgonzola, etc.
pre.riz: Average of emission factors for various rice types: white rice, brown rice, red rice, wild rice.
pre.ble: Average of emission factors for various wheat types: whole durum wheat, precooked wheat, wheat semolina, soft wheat.
pre.hotel: Includes emissions related to energy consumption (heating, electricity, air conditioning, hot water), maintenance services (cleaning, laundry), infrastructure (construction, maintenance), and commuting of staff.
pre.camping: Includes the construction and energy consumption of infrastructure (showers, sanitary facilities, and lighting).
pre.location: Includes emissions related to energy consumption (heating, electricity, hot water), infrastructure (construction), and maintenance services.
pre.residencesecondaire: Includes emissions related to energy consumption (heating, electricity, hot water), infrastructure (construction), and maintenance services.
pre.magasin: For a 1 kg package, car travel.
pre.pointrelais: For a 1 kg package, car travel.
pre.clickcollect: For a 1 kg package, car travel.
pre.voiturefrancaisejour: Average annual emissions of private thermal cars from 2013 to 2024 (70.7 Mt CO2 e) reported per day.
pre.voiturefrancaisean: Average emissions of private cars in circulation from 2013 to 2024.
pre.populationfrancaise: Estimate of greenhouse gases associated with the average lifestyle of the French population, whose carbon footprint is estimated at 9.1 t CO₂e. The French population is estimated at 68,606,000 inhabitants in 2025.
pre.chauffageenfrance: Average annual emissions linked to heating, domestic hot water and cooking from 2013 to 2024 (43.32 Mt CO2 e).
pre.numeriqueenfrance: Emissions in 2022 linked to the manufacture, distribution, use, and end of life of devices.
pre.aviationcivileenfrance: Average annual emissions from 2013 to 2024 on domestic flights and international flights departing from France.
pre.agricoleenfrancejour: Average annual emissions from agriculture from 2013 to 2024 (79 MT CO₂e) reported on a 1-day basis. Land use, land-use change and forestry are not included in the scope.
pre.chauffageenfrancejour: Average annual emissions related to heating, domestic hot water and cooking from 2013 to 2024 (43.73 Mt CO2 e), reported per day.
pre.foretenfrancejour: Absorption inventoried in 2024 (51.1 Mt CO₂e), reported per day.
pre.climatisationenfrancejour: Emissions inventoried in 2024 (1.196 Mt CO₂e), reported per day.
pre.voiturefrancaiseheure: Average annual emissions of private thermal cars from 2013 to 2024 (70.7 Mt CO2 e) reported per hour.
pre.numeriqueenfrancejour: Annual emissions in 2022 related to the manufacture, distribution, use, and end of life of devices, reported per day.
pre.traitementdechetsjour: Average annual emissions related to waste and domestic burning and wastewater from 2013 to 2024 (1.89 Mt CO2 e), reported per day.
pre.trainenfrancejour: Average annual train emissions from 2013 to 2024 for transporting people and goods (0.43 MT CO₂e), reported per day.
pre.datacenterjour: PAR1 campus in Nozay, which includes 23 data centers, spans 110 hectares, and has a power capacity of 250 MW. Electricity consumption of 1.3 TWh/year, reported using the 2024 electricity mix.
pre.avion-johannesburg-paris-rugby: For the 2023 World Cup, travel of a delegation of 45 people (33 players and 12 staff members) by long-distance plane, over a total distance traveled of 17,462 km.
pre.maisonneuve: Construction of a new conventional house of 130 m² living space - case of housing in Saint-Pierre and Miquelon.
pre.moto: Motorcycle with engine capacity over 250 cm³
pre.moto-petite: Motorcycle with engine capacity 250 cm³ or less
pre.veli: Vel 100% electric with a 6.1 kWh battery, consuming 55 Wh/km and a lifespan of 70,000 km
pre.veliassistance: Vel with electric assistance consuming 10 Wh/km, of which 8 Wh/km is electricity, and a lifespan of 70,000 km
pre.triporteurelectrique: Electric cargo tricycle with a 562 Wh battery and a lifespan of 30,000 km
pre.repasavecduboeuf: 150g beef rib steak (4,34 kg CO₂e), 300g mixed vegetables (0,24 kg CO₂e), 7g extra virgin olive oil (0,01 kg CO₂e), 200g average dessert (0,34 kg CO₂e), 50g bread (0,04 kg CO₂e).
pre.repasvegetarien: 120g non-meat animal protein (0,23 kg CO₂e), 300g mixed vegetables (0,24 kg CO₂e), 7g olive oil (0,01 kg CO₂e), 200g average dessert (0,34 kg CO₂e), 50g bread (0,04 kg CO₂e).
pre.repasvegetalien: 100g plant-based protein (0,10 kg CO₂e), 300g mixed vegetables (0,24 kg CO₂e), 7g olive oil (0,01 kg CO₂e), 200g fruit (0,15 kg CO₂e), 50g bread (0,04 kg CO₂e).
pre.repasavecdupoissonblanc: 150g white fish/cod (1,81 kg CO₂e), 300g mixed vegetables (0,24 kg CO₂e), 7g olive oil (0,01 kg CO₂e), 200g average dessert (0,34 kg CO₂e), 50g bread (0,04 kg CO₂e).
pre.repasavecdupoissongras: 150g salmon (0,83 kg CO₂e), 300g mixed vegetables (0,24 kg CO₂e), 7g olive oil (0,01 kg CO₂e), 200g average dessert (0,34 kg CO₂e), 50g bread (0,04 kg CO₂e).
pre.repasavecdupoulet: 150g chicken (0,84 kg CO₂e), 300g mixed vegetables (0,24 kg CO₂e), 7g olive oil (0,01 kg CO₂e), 200g average dessert (0,34 kg CO₂e), 50g bread (0,04 kg CO₂e).
pre.repasavecduporc: 150g pork rib (1,02 kg CO₂e), 300g mixed vegetables (0,24 kg CO₂e), 7g olive oil (0,01 kg CO₂e), 200g average dessert (0,34 kg CO₂e), 50g bread (0,04 kg CO₂e).
pre.repasavecduveau: 150g veal rib (3,5 kg CO₂e), 300g mixed vegetables (0,24 kg CO₂e), 7g olive oil (0,01 kg CO₂e), 200g average dessert (0,34 kg CO₂e), 50g bread (0,04 kg CO₂e).
pre.repasavecdulieunoir: 150g saithe/coalfish (1,24 kg CO₂e), 300g mixed vegetables (0,24 kg CO₂e), 7g olive oil (0,01 kg CO₂e), 200g average dessert (0,34 kg CO₂e), 50g bread (0,04 kg CO₂e).
pre.repasavecduthon: 150g tinned tuna in oil (0,97 kg CO₂e), 300g mixed vegetables (0,24 kg CO₂e), 7g olive oil (0,01 kg CO₂e), 200g average dessert (0,34 kg CO₂e), 50g bread (0,04 kg CO₂e).

post.ski: Includes: the carbon impact of transportation (52%), accommodation (4%), food (8%), ski area (3%), infrastructure, equipment, and services (17%), and gear (16%).
post.piscine: 58,000 liters of tap water to fill it.
post.terre-voiture: Included are direct emissions, the construction of vehicles (manufacturing, maintenance, and end-of-life), and the production and distribution of fuel and electricity. The construction of infrastructure (roads, railways, airports...) is not included.
post.avion-courtcourrier: Per person in France. We account for the carbon impact of contrail formation. Included are direct emissions, the construction of vehicles (manufacturing, maintenance, and end-of-life), and the production and distribution of fuel and electricity. The construction of infrastructure (roads, railways, airports...) is not included.
post.avion-moyencourrier: Per person in France. We account for the carbon impact of contrail formation. Included are direct emissions, the construction of vehicles (manufacturing, maintenance, and end-of-life), and the production and distribution of fuel and electricity. The construction of infrastructure (roads, railways, airports...) is not included.
post.avion-moyenlongcourrier: Per person in France. We account for the carbon impact of contrail formation. Included are direct emissions, the construction of vehicles (manufacturing, maintenance, and end-of-life), and the production and distribution of fuel and electricity. The construction of infrastructure (roads, railways, airports...) is not included.
post.avion-longcourrier: Per person in France. We account for the carbon impact of contrail formation. Included are direct emissions, the construction of vehicles (manufacturing, maintenance, and end-of-life), and the production and distribution of fuel and electricity. The construction of infrastructure (roads, railways, airports...) is not included.
post.avion-pny: Included are direct emissions, the construction of vehicles (manufacturing, maintenance, and end-of-life), and the production and distribution of fuel and electricity. The construction of infrastructure (roads, railways, airports...) is not included.
post.tgv-paris-berlin: Included are direct emissions, the construction of vehicles (manufacturing, maintenance, and end-of-life), and the production and distribution of fuel and electricity. The construction of infrastructure (roads, railways, airports...) is not included.
post.tgv-paris-marseille: Included are direct emissions, the construction of vehicles (manufacturing, maintenance, and end-of-life), and the production and distribution of fuel and electricity. The construction of infrastructure (roads, railways, airports...) is not included.
post.voiture-lille-nimes: Included are direct emissions, the construction of vehicles (manufacturing, maintenance, and end-of-life), and the production and distribution of fuel and electricity. The construction of infrastructure (roads, railways, airports...) is not included.
post.francais: French people emit an average of 9.1 tonnes of CO₂e per year. This average varies widely depending on lifestyle: whether or not people use a car, their purchases and consumption, whether they live in a house or an apartment, their heating method, and their diet.
post.game-of-thrones: An episode of Game of Thrones lasts an average of 1 hour. The data is calculated based on one hour of HD streaming on a television using Wi-Fi.
post.friends: The entire Friends series consists of 236 episodes of about 20 minutes each. The data is calculated based on one hour of HD streaming on a television using Wi-Fi.
